---
title: "Homework"
---

# Unit 1 homework check (due Thursday, March 26 at 23:59:00)

  - [Unit 1 homework](homeworks/Unit 1 homework/unit.1.hw.zip)

# Unit 1 homework (due Sunday, March 29 at 23:59:00) 

  - [Unit 1 homework sample solutions]
  
# Unit 2 homework check (due Sunday, April 5th at 23:59:00)  

  - [Unit 2 homework]
  
# Unit 2 homework (due Sunday, April 12 at 23:59:00) 

  - [Unit 2 homework sample solutions]

# Unit 3 exam (Thursday, April 23 from 2:45 to 4:00 pm) 

  - [Unit 3 exam solutions]

# Final exam homework check (due Sunday, May 3 at 23:59:00)

  - [Final project]

# Final project (due Wednesday, May 6 at 23:59:00)
